paths.title: Complete Course
paths.description: All 14 lessons in the recommended order from artifact foundations through surface strategy and open limits.

paths.title: Workflow Builder Path
paths.description: Focus on designing practical staged workflows with clear artifact boundaries and context discipline.

paths.title: Governance-First Path
paths.description: Prioritize policy, approval, audit, and cross-host control design before deeper portability work.

paths.title: Cross-Tool Portability Path
paths.description: Focus on what can be reused safely across GitHub Copilot, VS Code, and Claude, and where semantic drift must be managed.
